_purpose: Append-only log of concept slugs minted by behavior:15-track-concept-proficiency when a learner exercises a concept that is not yet in the canonical concept:* registry. Read by cli-tool:propose-concept to promote frequently-minted slugs into the registry.

_schema.learner: github_username of the learner whose session produced this mint
_schema.context: short phrase describing what the learner was building when the concept appeared
_schema.tier: exposed|guided|independent|teaching (tier graded at AAR for this mint)

_analyze: Get-Content .github/knowledge-graph/data/concept-mints.jsonl | Where-Object { $_ -notmatch '_meta' } | ConvertFrom-Json | Group-Object slug | Sort-Object Count -Desc
